description: dropna axis=0→1 drops columns with NaN instead of rows

_meta.explanation: axis=1 drops columns that contain NaN values. Column 'a' has one NaN → it is dropped. Column 'b' has no NaN → it is kept. All 3 rows remain.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 1. axis=0 vs axis=1 is a perpetual confusion point.
